sections.heading: ANNEX II
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on own funds and own funds requirements.

sections.description: Information regarding the group solvency and its affiliates.

sections.description: General instructions for reporting templates C 06.01 and C 06.02.

sections.description: Details on group solvency information required in template C 06.02.

sections.description: Instructions on reporting contributions of individual entities to group solvency.

C 06.01.name: GROUP SOLVENCY: INFORMATION ON AFFILIATES – Total (GS Total)
C 06.01.description: Reports total contributions of entities within the scope of consolidation to group solvency.
C 06.01.section_heading: 2.4. C 06.01 – GROUP SOLVENCY: INFORMATION ON AFFILIATES – Total (GS Total)

C 06.02.name: GROUP SOLVENCY: INFORMATION ON AFFILIATES (GS)
C 06.02.description: Gathers detailed information on all entities within the scope of consolidation regarding their solvency.
